scope: Develop a terminal-based UI dashboard that aggregates information from various sources including email, Google Calendar, Spotify's latest releases and news based on user preferences and genre, and the latest news according to user preference. The dashboard should have a well-structured layout with clear visual elements for each data source. Ensure that the application is responsive and supports keyboard navigation.

tasks.title: Integrate Google Calendar API
tasks.description: Create a new project in the Google Cloud Console, enable the Calendar API for your project, and generate OAuth 2.0 client IDs or service account keys to authenticate API calls. Implement methods within the Textual app class to fetch calendar events using these credentials. Ensure that the fetched data is displayed appropriately in the designated section of the layout. Tests: Verify successful authentication and retrieval of calendar events with expected structure.

tasks.title: Final Integration and Testing
tasks.description: Run all tests for each implemented feature to ensure that the application works as expected. Verify that the layout is responsive, data from various sources is correctly aggregated and displayed, and keyboard navigation functions properly. Tests: Run integration tests covering all features and edge cases.

task_summaries: ✗ task_2: Integrate Google Calendar API (3 iter)
✗ task_6: Final Integration and Testing (3 iter)
